description: Create a content slide titled 'Your Face, in the Future' with a full-width horizontal process-flow timeline showing historical milestones, near-term AI milestones, and a 2030 forward-looking outcome.

header.kicker: Technology Vision 2025 | AI: A Declaration of Autonomy
header.headline: Your Face, in the Future

steps.label: Quaker Mills’ Quaker man is one of the first corporate mascots
Ronald McDonald makes his first TV appearance and becomes an icon
As part of a DARPA project, Carnegie Mellon University creates Harpy, foundational to modern Interactive Voice Response (IVR) systems
Salesforce.com launches its website, allowing online access to its CRM systems
IKEA unveils one of the first customer-facing chatbots
Amazon releases Alexa, an AI assistant with a persona
Lil Miquela debuts on Instagram, the first AI influencer to go viral
Instagram tests Creator.ai for influencers to connect with fans via chatbots that mimic their personalities
OpenAI releases GPT-4o with Advanced Voice mode’s human-like speech
Real-time generative AI voice models become common in customer service
A celebrity influencer signs a landmark contract letting a company use their personality not only in advertisements but product lines, customer service, and digital experiences

A major airline introduces an AI agent that will autonomously generate personalized trip pricing and travel recommendations based on customer loyalty programs, company offers, and affiliated partnerships
Companies routinely use customer conversations with AI agents as a data source to build customer profiles
With the rise of agents, machine customers drive more than 20% of many businesses’ revenue, transforming sales strategies
